name: Inside Out Ravioli
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat, onion, and garlic in oil (oil is optional if using extra-lean meat). Remove excess grease.
2. Add tomato sauce and paste (diluted with 3 cans of water), dried parsley, oregano, salt, and pepper to the pan. Simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Cook the mostaccioli according to package instructions. Drain and rinse with cold water. Return the pasta to the pan.
4. Add cooked spinach, American cheese, bread crumbs, eggs, oil, and Parmesan cheese to the pasta.
5. Spread the mixture in a greased 9x13-inch baking dish.
6. Top with the meat mixture.
7. Sprinkle additional grated Parmesan cheese on top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
